_comment: Fixture for reference.md. `cli` steps are NOT mocked by runeflow test — they run real shell commands. The git commands here are deterministic enough (they succeed in any git repo). Only the `llm` step is mocked. Assertions check the mocked LLM output propagates to the workflow outputs.

draft.title: feat: add scenarios DX harness
draft.body:
## Summary

Introduces `scenarios/` with a concept-budget metric and two loops (scripted + agent-authored) so every runtime or docs change can be measured against an authoring baseline.

## Why

Hand-writing a skill from scratch surfaced ~8 concepts for a task that should need ~3. Without a feedback loop, DX improvements are guesswork.

outputs.title: feat: add scenarios DX harness
outputs.body:
